final_dimensions_in: master scale = 1/(1-shrinkage); for 12% shrinkage = 1.136x fired body
orientation: X along mouthpiece axis; Z up; mark split-line and chamber datum
operation: Print, sand layer lines, fill voids, seal/sand, sign with build ID
yield_or_offcut: Save offcut sprues for shrinkage coupons
notes: Master scale factor must be re-derived from MEASURED clay shrinkage before final master.

orientation: X along mouthpiece axis; Z up; mark split-line
yield_or_offcut: Reuse offcut sprues for shrinkage coupons

orientation: Smooth face inward; mark inner clamping zone
yield_or_offcut: One sheet of 24 x 18 x 0.75 yields all 4
notes: Clean parting wax/release before each pour.

orientation: Pour with master keyed to first half; second half over registration
operation: Mix to 73:100 water:plaster (by weight); 2-min slake; pour around sealed master
yield_or_offcut: Trim spew/edge after demold; recover small offcuts as test slabs
notes: Min 1.50 in plaster around master where practical for stiffness.

operation: Slip pour > drain at target wall (~0.16 in / 0.4 cm) > demold leather-hard
yield_or_offcut: Reuse demold trim/fettling waste as slip recycle
notes: Wall thickness drives drying time and tap tone — measure on noncritical trim.

final_dimensions_in: 0.354 x 0.197 (window W x H = 0.9 x 0.5 cm per design)
operation: Score, lift, clean labium edge with rib
notes: Cut undersized; tune by enlarging at bisque tuning step.

final_dimensions_in: 0.16-0.31 dia each (start undersized; see design table OCA-DRW-005)
orientation: Per fingering chart row D40:F51 of design table
operation: Brass tube cutter or hole punch; clean burr with damp finger
notes: All 12 holes start at design-table 'minimum' diameter; enlarge at tuning.

final_dimensions_in: Within +/-25 cents of target frequency per validation.csv
operation: Diamond needle file or fine diamond burr in steps
yield_or_offcut: Diamond burr offcuts are kiln dust — bag and discard
notes: Document each enlarge step on validation row.

final_dimensions_in: ~0.020 in dry film over voicing window + all 12 holes + interior
operation: Brush-apply; dry per supplier; check all openings clear
notes: Mask all acoustic edges to keep glaze out of windway and holes.
Glaze in voicing window or holes will detune the instrument.
